name: Web Process
description: The process-tier capstone of the constellation — the connective tissue that binds a project's self-driven SDLC into one portable, no-lock-in everything-as-code declaration a foreign PM/CI tool could read and drive. It defines the Self-Driven Project Artefact Contract: a discoverable file/metadata structure for requirements + methodology artefacts, plus composable meta-schemas — an autonomy-level registry (report-only → live-patch), a value/risk-ODD dimension registry (the tolerance dial that throttles autonomy), a gate-definition schema, and a step schema — each shipping a default flavor, with one fully-defined default recipe projects extend (config-extends-platform-default). It is a capstone made of WE standards: it standardizes only the autonomy vocabulary, the value/risk-ODD dial, and the binding contract, and composes the rest — Web Compliance + Web Policy (gates), Web Workflows (step orchestration), Web Audit + Web Reporting (run evidence), Web Decisions (the human-handoff record), and #100 requirement-as-code (requirements). The one new lock is the binding Protocol — and it is escapable (a third-party tool drives the same files); everything beneath it is already-open WE standards. Recipes (how a given project is driven) are a configurable layer authored in Plateau, not standard surface; the WE backlog itself is one dogfooded recipe. Ratified by #690 (a first-class WE node owns the contract) under epic #666; framing from #665.
